channel.title: Network Protocols on Analyst
channel.description: Recent content in Network Protocols on Analyst

item.title: TCP/IP Stack
item.description: This article is an overview of TCP/IP protocol stack. I will cover in detail what happens when a request to, say, google.

item.title: Ethernet
item.description: This is a protocol of TCP/IP suite, Data Link Layer. The first layer after physical layer.

item.title: 3D Secure
item.description: This article is about 3DS protocol (XML-based) which is used to secure online payments. There are three parties in this process: merchant, aquirer and the bank (the issuer of the card).

item.title: TCP
item.description: Lorem markdownum aequalis strigis. Saetigeri iubeas, vultu huic alvum nondum de obside ut laniavit arbor palmis, cum quin.
